description: Create a two-column content slide titled 'Some key numbers on how the Australian public is feeling' with four donut charts comparing 2024 in retrospect and the outlook for 2025.

header.headline: Some key numbers on how the Australian public is feeling

steps.label: 2024 in retrospect
steps.sub: 63% say “2024 was a bad year for my country”, down from 67% last year.

steps.label: 2024 in retrospect
steps.sub: 52% say “2024 was a bad year for me and my family”, which is the same as 2023.

steps.label: Outlook for 2025
steps.sub: 71% say they are “optimistic that next year will be a better year than this year”, up from 68% last year.

steps.label: Outlook for 2025
steps.sub: 47% say “The global economy will be stronger next year than it was this year”, down from 48% last year.

items.label: 2024 was a bad year for my country
Optimistic that next year will be a better year than this year
2024 was a bad year for me and my family
The global economy will be stronger next year than it was this year
